summary: Comprehensive E2E testing of new Buyer→Seller Review/Rating system (P2 roadmap item). All 18 backend tests passed. Frontend Playwright tests verified profile page reviews tab, star rating display, review list, and review form visibility logic.
critical_code_review_comments: Review system correctly enforces only winning buyer of sold auction can post review
Duplicate review prevention works (400 'Вече сте оставили отзив')
Eligibility endpoint returns correct reasons: not_sold, not_buyer, already_reviewed, seller_mismatch, auction_not_found
Profile endpoint now includes rating:{avg,count} field
Frontend SellerReviews component shows star distribution, review list, and conditionally shows compose form
Rating pill in hero section links to reviews tab when count>0

test_credentials.review_buyer: reviewbuyer@test.bg / test12345 (already posted review for sold auction)

seed_data_creation: Existing review from reviewbuyer@test.bg for auction c049f61a-7c0b-4cf5-994f-387776bb2403 (BMW M2 Club sport spec)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Review system fully tested. Test file /app/backend/tests/test_reviews.py covers: GET reviews list with rating aggregate, GET rating endpoint, profile rating field, eligibility checks (all 5 reasons), review creation validation (self-review, non-buyer, non-existent auction), reviewable purchases endpoint, live auction review block, and regression tests for auth/auctions/profile. Frontend verified: reviews tab, star rating display, review count, reviews list, review form visibility logic.

backend: GET /api/users/{seller_id}/reviews - returns items array and rating:{avg,count}
GET /api/users/{seller_id}/reviews/eligible/{auction_id} - returns eligible:false with reason:not_sold (live auction)
regression: GET /api/auctions/{sold_id} - returns sold auction with status=sold
GET /api/users/{id}/profile - returns profile with all expected fields
frontend: Profile page loads with new 'Отзиви' tab [data-testid=profile-tab-reviews]
Reviews tab shows star distribution chart
Reviews tab shows reviews list with review items [data-testid=review-item-{id}]
Rating stat in stats section shows numeric avg (5.0) or '—' if no reviews
Rating pill in hero section shows avg and count, links to reviews tab
Review form hidden when viewing own profile
Review form hidden when buyer already reviewed all purchases from seller
Sold auction detail page loads correctly with ПРОДАДЕН badge

mocked_apis.stripe_preauth: mock_pi_* tokens used for payment pre-authorization (unchanged)
mocked_apis.resend_email: Falls back to console log if no API key
mocked_apis.twilio_sms: Falls back to console log if no credentials
